steps.title: Track the sequence
steps.content: The passage describes a process in order. First, water seeps through channels; after the blank, magma heats the water; finally, pressure forces water out of the ground. The transition must move from the first step to the following step.

steps.title: Select the next step
steps.content: A signals similarity, B signals contrast, and C repeats the opening sequence marker even though the first step has already happened. The needed transition shows the process advancing to the second stage. The answer is D.
